channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Ariana Grande @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-06-10 03:00 — Ariana Grande at Oakland Arena. Ariana Grande's tour is highly anticipated, promising a strong live performance and a massive fanbase.

item.title: Lionel Richie @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-07 02:30 — Lionel Richie at Chase Center. Lionel Richie and Earth, Wind & Fire bring legendary status and a nostalgic appeal to the stage.

item.title: Meghan Trainor @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-08-09 01:30 — Meghan Trainor at Chase Center. Meghan Trainor's tour is likely to feature catchy pop hits and an engaging live experience.

item.title: ZAYN @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-03 03:00 — ZAYN at Chase Center. ZAYN's tour is generating buzz, and his live performances are known for their emotional depth.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose. RUSH's legacy and their upcoming tour are sure to attract dedicated fans and rock enthusiasts.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is known for their energetic performances and unique blend of genres.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. The Fray and Dashboard Confessional together promise a nostalgic evening for fans of early 2000s rock.

item.title: Three Days Grace @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-19 03:00 — Three Days Grace at SAP Center at San Jose. Three Days Grace's tour promises a hard-hitting rock experience for fans of the genre.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's laid-back style and outdoor venue will create a relaxed and enjoyable atmosphere.

item.title: John Mellencamp @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-13 03:00 — John Mellencamp at Shoreline Amphitheatre. A$AP Rocky's tour is highly anticipated, showcasing his dynamic stage presence and popular hits.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band's reputation for soulful performances makes this a compelling choice.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:30 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Head And The Heart are known for their heartfelt performances, making this a must-see show.

item.title: O.A.R. @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:30 — O.A.R. at The Masonic. O.A.R.'s long-standing reputation for engaging live shows makes this a solid pick.

item.title: Belle & Sebastian @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-06-12 03:00 — Belle & Sebastian at The Masonic. Belle & Sebastian's classic songs will resonate with long-time fans and newcomers alike.

item.title: A$AP Rocky @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-06-26 02:30 — A$AP Rocky at Chase Center. Kid Cudi's tour is expected to be a highlight, featuring his unique blend of hip-hop and performance art.

item.title: Olivia Dean @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-07-12 03:00 — Olivia Dean at Chase Center. Olivia Dean's rising star status and engaging performances make her shows a great pick.
